messages.content:
You are a Grounding Agent. Execute tasks using tools.

# Tool Execution

- Select appropriate tools from descriptions and schemas
- Provide correct parameters
- Call multiple tools if needed
- Tools execute immediately, results appear in next iteration
- If you need results to decide next action, wait for next iteration

# Tool Selection Tips

- **MCP tools** and **Shell tools** are typically faster and more accurate when applicable

# Skill Retrieval

If the current approach is failing or the task requires domain-specific knowledge you don't have, call `retrieve_skill` with a short description of what guidance you need. It returns verified procedures when available.

# Task Completion

After each iteration, evaluate if the task is complete:

**If task is COMPLETE:**
- Write a response summarizing what was accomplished
- Include the completion token `<COMPLETE>` on a new line at the end of your response
- Example response format:
  ```
  I have successfully completed the task. The file has been created at /path/to/file.txt with the requested content.

  <COMPLETE>
  ```

**If task is NOT complete:**
- Continue by calling the appropriate tools
- Do NOT output `<COMPLETE>`
- Tool results will appear in the next iteration

The token `<COMPLETE>` signals that no further iterations are needed.

**Working Directory**: `logs\recordings\task_7791d5b8e270_20260404_054936`
- All task files (input/output) are located in this directory
- Read from and write to this directory for all file operations

Trình bày theo phong cách Claude: dùng Markdown rõ ràng với tiêu đề ## hoặc ### cho các mục chính; tiêu đề phải nổi bật hơn nội dung thường; tách phần lớn bằng ---; dùng danh sách bằng dấu - và không dùng ký tự •; ưu tiên code inline cho từ khóa kỹ thuật; mọi đoạn code phải đặt trong fenced code block có ghi rõ ngôn ngữ (ví dụ ```python); nếu cần vẽ sơ đồ thì trả về block ```mermaid hợp lệ; không trả code thuần; giọng văn điềm tĩnh, mạch lạc.

hi

tools.name: shell_agent
tools.description:
[Shell] Delegate a task to an intelligent shell agent that autonomously writes and executes code, and will automatically retry and fix errors when possible.
Give it a natural-language task description...

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: [Shell] Read the full text content of a file at the given path. Use this to inspect skill resources, configuration files, scripts, etc.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: [Shell] Write text content to a file at the given path. Creates the file and parent directories if they do not exist; overwrites the file if it already exists.

tools.name: list_dir
tools.description: [Shell] List the contents of a directory. Returns file names, sizes, and modification dates. Defaults to the current directory if no path is given.

tools.name: run_shell
tools.description: [Shell] Execute a shell command as-is and return raw stdout/stderr. You provide the exact command (or script); it is run without interpretation, modification, or automatic retry. If the task requires ...

tools.name: list_backend_tools
tools.description: [System] List static tools for a backend

tools.name: list_session_tools
tools.description: [System] List tools (incl. dynamic) for a session

tools.name: list_all_backend_tools
tools.description: [System] List static tools for every registered backend

function.name: shell_agent
function.arguments: {"task": "Tr\u00ecnh b\u00e0y theo phong c\u00e1ch Claude: d\u00f9ng Markdown r\u00f5 r\u00e0ng v\u1edbi ti\u00eau \u0111\u1ec1 ## ho\u1eb7c ### cho c\u00e1c m\u1ee5c ch\u00ednh; ti\u00eau \u0111\u1ec1 ph\u1ea3i n\u1ed5i b\u1eadt h\u01a1n n\u1ed9i dung th\u01b0\u1eddng; t\u00e1ch ph\u1ea7n l\u1edbn b\u1eb1ng ---; d\u00f9ng danh s\u00e1ch b\u1eb1ng d\u1ea5u - v\u00e0 kh\u00f4ng d\u00f9ng k\u00fd t\u1ef1 \u2022; \u01b0u ti\u00ean code inline cho t\u1eeb kh\u00f3a k\u1ef9 thu\u1eadt; m\u1ecdi \u0111o\u1ea1n code ph\u1ea3i \u0111\u1eb7t trong fenced code block c\u00f3 ghi r\u00f5 ng\u00f4n ng\u1eef (v\u00ed d\u1ee5 ```python); n\u1ebfu c\u1ea7n v\u1ebd s\u01a1 \u0111\u1ed3 th\u00ec tr\u1ea3 v\u1ec1 block ```mermaid h\u1ee3p l\u1ec7; kh\u00f4ng tr\u1ea3 code thu\u1ea7n; gi\u1ecdng v\u0103n \u0111i\u1ec1m t\u0129nh, m\u1ea1ch l\u1ea1c."}

function.name: shell_agent
function.arguments: {"task": "Please provide the content you would like me to write in a Markdown file."}
